role_title: Senior QA Automation Engineer - Praca zdalna K/M
job_description: Stanowisko Obecnie dla naszego klienta z branży finansowej poszukujemy kandydata/kandydatki na stanowisko Senior QA Automation Engineer (K/M) Dodatkowe informacje Praca zdalna (raz na miesiąc spotkania zespołu w biurze - Warszawa) Oferowane wynagrodzenie Wynagrodzenie: od 900 do 1100 PLN netto+VAT/dzień/kontrakt B2B, w zależności od posiadanego doświadczenia i kompetencji Sprawdzisz się w tej roli, jeżeli: Posiadasz doświadczenie w automatyzacji testów i swobodnie poruszasz się w środowisku Java Pracowałeś(-aś) z Selenium i potrafisz rozwijać oraz utrzymywać frameworki testów automatycznych Masz doświadczenie w automatyzacji testów API (wykorzystując REST Assured) Rozumiesz sposób działania aplikacji opartych o architekturę mikroserwisową i potrafisz efektywnie testować takie rozwiązania Znasz standardy komunikacji REST, pracujesz z formatem JSON oraz dokumentacją API (Swagger/OpenAPI) Potrafisz korzystać z SQL podczas analizy danych oraz weryfikacji wyników testów Pracujesz z systemem kontroli wersji Git i dobrze odnajdujesz się w zespołowym procesie wytwarzania oprogramowania Cechuje Cię samodzielność, analityczne podejście do rozwiązywania problemów oraz dbałość o szczegóły Znasz język angielski Mile widziane: Doświadczenie z platformą Google Cloud Platform (GCP) Znajomość narzędzi wspierających proces CI/CD Doświadczenie z Dockerem lub Kubernetes Praktyka w budowaniu strategii testów i rozwijaniu procesów QA w projektach opartych o metodyki zwinne Zadania, które na Ciebie czekają: Projektowanie, rozwój i utrzymanie testów automatycznych Tworzenie scenariuszy oraz przypadków testowych dla nowych funkcjonalności Automatyzacja testów API i UI Koordynowanie procesu testowania na poszczególnych etapach realizacji projektu Analiza wyników testów, raportowanie jakości oraz zbieranie metryk Współpraca z Developerami, Architektami i Product Ownerami w celu zapewnienia wysokiej jakości dostarczanych rozwiązań Wsparcie utrzymania środowisk testowych i rozwojowych oraz ciągłe doskonalenie procesu testowego Nasz proces rekrutacji Rozmowa z naszym Rekruterem -> Rozmowa z naszym Business Managerem -> Spotkanie z Klientem W uzasadnionych przypadkach po rozmowie z Rekruterem wprowadzamy dodatkowy etap weryfikacji technicznej Potrzebujesz więcej informacji? Skontaktuj się ze mną: martyna.choinka@astek.net Skontaktujemy się tylko z wybranymi kandydatami. Co oferujemy Długoterminowa współpraca Szkolenia techniczne, certyfikaty i podnoszenie kwalifikacji Mentoring Competence Center - bycie członkiem społeczności CC od pierwszego dnia pracy jest szansą na rozwijanie swoich umiejętności, uczestniczenie w różnych konferencjach oraz dzielenie się wiedzą i doświadczeniem z ludźmi, którzy na co dzień mierzą się z tymi samymi wyzwaniami Jasna ścieżka kariery Pakiet benefitów pracowniczych (Multisport, prywatna opieka medyczna, ubezpieczenie na życie) Przyjazną atmosferę pracy, imprezy integracyjne i spotkania team-buildingowe System rekomendacji Znasz kogoś, kogo zainteresuje ta oferta? Skorzystaj z naszego systemu rekomendacji i zgarnij bonus do 7000 zl! Link: https://astek.pl/system-rekomendacji/ Klauzula informacyjna Administratorem Pana/Pani danych osobowych jest ASTEK Polska sp. z o.o. z siedziba w Warszawie (00-133) przy Al. Jana Pawla II 22. Przysługuje Pani/Panu prawo do wglądu do danych, prawo żądania usunięcia danych itp. Szczegółowe informacje dotyczace przetwarzania: http://astek.pl/polityka-prywatnosci W dowolnym momencie przysługuje Panu/Pani prawo do wycofania wyrażonych zgód. W razie wycofania zgód prosimy o kontakt e-mailowy na adres privacy@astek.net lub pisemnie na adres administratora. Procedura dokonywania zgłoszeń przez sygnalistów w ASTEK Polska sp. z o. o.: https://astek.pl/sygnalisci/ Nr ref AO235374

fit_summary: role alignment 25/25; skills match 35/35; location/work mode 2/15; experience fit 6/15; profile pack 8/10

job_description: The Team Morningstar DBRS is a leading provider of independent credit rating services and opinions for corporate and sovereign entities, financial institutions, and project and structured finance instruments globally. Rating more than 4,000 issuers and 60,000 securities, we are one of the top four credit rating agencies in the world and a market leader in Canada, the U.S., and Europe in multiple asset classes. Morningstar DBRS empowers investor success by bringing more transparency and a much-needed diversity of opinion in the credit rating industry. Our approach and size allow us to be nimble enough to respond to customers' needs in their local markets, but large enough to provide the necessary expertise and resources they require. Market innovators choose to work with us because of our agility, tech-forward approach, and exceptional customer service. The Role The Senior QA Automation Engineer will work closely with cross functional teams, Development teams, and other development teams to ensure a timely and high-quality delivery. Will have to coordinate and work with the members in a global team. We are looking for an individual who can apply discipline, create solid software products, and be accountable for deliverables. Position Location: Chicago, IL (we follow a hybrid policy requiring 4 days onsite) Responsibilities Define and establish the automation strategy, framework, and testing processes. Understand complex application architecture and design effective automation test frameworks. Build end-to-end web QA automation with Python for the back end, using GitHub Copilot where appropriate. Help establish AI standards and practices to support faster and more reliable adoption across the QA group. Analyze requirements, design test scenarios, and develop automation test cases. Own QA requirements and provide testing guidance to the broader technology team. Contribute as an individual contributor while also leading key QA initiatives. Lead and coordinate application enhancement and TechOps testing activities with technology and business teams. Participate actively in team ceremonies, including stand-ups, planning sessions, and retrospectives. Communicate regular project updates, including completed work, work in progress, next steps, risks, quality metrics, KPIs, and costs. Requirements 5+ years of experience in Quality Assurance and Testing, including 3+ years of hands-on automation experience. Strong understanding of test frameworks, Selenium WebDriver, test management tools, bug-tracking tools such as ALM, TestRail, and Jira, and Agile methodologies. Proven experience in automated testing of financial applications and web portals. Expertise in UI automation using Selenium WebDriver and automation framework development. Understanding of retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), vector databases, and MCP development. Experience with Python, SQL/NoSQL databases, and AWS. Hands-on experience using GitHub Copilot as an AI assistant during software development. Proficiency in Java and JavaScript. Expertise in API testing, both manual and automated, using Rest Assured and ReadyAPI. Exposure to performance testing and security testing too Self-driven with a practical, professional approach to QA standards, procedures, and issue resolution. Ability to write use cases from product requirements, execute them, and report defects in a bug-tracking system. Demonstrated ability to lead, contribute independently, and help build a robust and flexible automation framework. Passion for mentoring and helping the QA community build automation skills. Current hands-on experience designing, building, and scaling cross-functional automation frameworks across back-end integration, database, and UI layers. Experience integrating test automation into CI/CD pipelines and supporting SDLC automation, including cloud-based test execution and reporting through tools such as ALM and Jira. Ability to improve quality and processes through automation strategy and technology selection based on architecture and process assessments. Strong SQL skills, including writing and understanding queries and stored procedures. Compensation And Benefits At Morningstar we believe people are at their best when they are at their healthiest. That’s why we champion your wellness through a wide range of programs that support all stages of your personal and professional life. Here are some examples of the offerings we provide: Financial Health 100% 401k match up to 6% of salary Stock Ownership Potential Company provided life insurance - 1x salary + commission Physical Health Comprehensive health benefits (medical/dental/vision) including potential premium discounts and company-provided HSA contributions (up to $500-$2,000 annually) for specific plans and coverages Additional medical Wellness Incentives - up to $300-$600 annual Company-provided long- and short-term disability insurance Emotional Health Trust-Based Time Off 6-week Paid Sabbatical Program 6-Week Paid Family Caregiving Leave Competitive 8-24 Week Paid Parental Leave Adoption Assistance Leadership Coaching & Formal Mentorship Opportunities Annual Flex Stipend - $1000 annually to cover personal education & well-being expenses Tuition Reimbursement Social Health Charitable Matching Gifts program Dollars for Doers volunteer program Paid volunteering days 15+ Employee Resource & Affinity Groups Total Cash Compensation Range $95,275.00-139,741.66 Inclusive of annual base salary and target incentive Morningstar's hybrid work environment gives you the opportunity to collaborate in-person each week as we've found that we're at our best when we're purposely together on a regular basis. In most of our locations, our hybrid work model is four days in-office each week. A range of other benefits are also available to enhance flexibility as needs change. No matter where you are, you'll have tools and resources to engage meaningfully with your global colleagues. R06_DBRSInc DBRS, Inc. - US Legal

Hands-on experience using GitHub Copilot as an AI assistant during software development. Proficiency in Java and JavaScript. Expertise in API testing, both manual and automated, using Rest Assured and ReadyAPI. Exposure to performance testing and security testing too Self-driven with a practical, professional approach to QA standards, procedures, and issue resolution. Ability to write use cases from product requirements, execute them, and report defects in a bug-tracking system. Demonstrated ability to lead, contribute independently, and help build a robust and flexible automation framework. Passion for mentoring and helping the QA community build automation skills. Current hands-on experience designing, building, and scaling cross-functional automation frameworks across back-end integration, database, and UI layers. Experience integrating test automation into CI/CD pipelines and supporting SDLC automation, including cloud-based test execution and reporting through tools such as ALM and Jira. Ability to improve quality and processes through automation strategy and technology selection based on architecture and process assessments. Strong SQL skills, including writing and understanding queries and stored procedures. Compensation And Benefits At Morningstar we believe people are at their best when they are at their healthiest. That’s why we champion your wellness through a wide range of programs that support all stages of your personal and professional life. Here are some examples of the offerings we provide: Financial Health 100% 401k match up to 6% of salary Stock Ownership Potential Company provided life insurance - 1x salary + commission Physical Health Comprehensive health benefits (medical/dental/vision) including potential premium discounts and company-provided HSA contributions (up to $500-$2,000 annually) for specific plans and coverages Additional medical Wellness Incentives - up to $300-$600 annual Company-provided long- and short-term disability insurance Emotional Health Trust-Based Time Off 6-week Paid Sabbatical Program 6-Week Paid Family Caregiving Leave Competitive 8-24 Week Paid Parental Leave Adoption Assistance Leadership Coaching & Formal Mentorship Opportunities Annual Flex Stipend - $1000 annually to cover personal education & well-being expenses Tuition Reimbursement Social Health Charitable Matching Gifts program Dollars for Doers volunteer program Paid volunteering days 15+ Employee Resource & Affinity Groups Total Cash Compensation Range $95,275.00-139,741.66 Inclusive of annual base salary and target incentive Morningstar's hybrid work environment gives you the opportunity to collaborate in-person each week as we've found that we're at our best when we're purposely together on a regular basis. In most of our locations, our hybrid work model is four days in-office each week. A range of other benefits are also available to enhance flexibility as needs change. No matter where you are, you'll have tools and resources to engage meaningfully with your global colleagues. R06_DBRSInc DBRS, Inc. - US Legal

fit_summary: role alignment 25/25; skills match 35/35; experience fit 6/15; profile pack 10/10

job_description: Overview PDF Solutions is redefining the way the semiconductor industry approaches data, analytics, and experience design. As part of our journey, we’re building Next gen platform — a modern, human-centered analytics platform. We believe design systems aren’t just about consistency — they’re about scalability , collaboration , and performance . The Senior QA Automation Engineer will play a critical role in ensuring the accuracy, reliability, security, and performance of our AI-enabled integration platform. This role goes beyond traditional UI testing. You will design and implement automation frameworks for backend services, cloud-native deployments, and machine learning-driven applications. You will be deeply involved in validating data pipelines, testing ML forecasts against historical datasets, and ensuring platform readiness across multi-cloud and containerized environments. The ideal candidate brings a strong automation-first mindset, hands-on experience with ML application testing, and the ability to work closely with engineering, data science, and DevOps teams to embed quality throughout the SDLC. Responsibilities Automation & Test Engineering Design, develop, and maintain scalable automation frameworks using Python, Java, Selenium, and API testing tools. Implement automated testing for backend services, data pipelines, and cloud-native microservices. Build reusable test components for regression, integration, and performance testing. AI / ML Application Validation Validate machine learning models by evaluating prediction accuracy against historical and real-world datasets. Design test strategies for forecasting, anomaly detection, and analytics pipelines used in integration platforms. Cloud, Container & DevOps Testing Test applications deployed as Docker containers across multiple cloud environments. Contribute to Helm charts, deployment pipelines, and test environments. Integrate automated tests into CI/CD pipelines and DevOps workflows. Security, Reliability & Observability Perform security testing using tools such as SQLMap, OWASP ZAP, and vulnerability scanners. Validate system reliability, fault tolerance, and recovery scenarios. Support observability testing using logs, metrics, and monitoring tools (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana). Quality Leadership Advocate for quality-driven engineering practices and shift-left testing strategies. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define test strategies aligned with product and business goals. Mentor junior QA engineers and contribute to continuous improvement of QA standards. Qualifications Must-Have Skills & Experience Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field. 6-10+ years of experience in QA Automation and test engineering. Strong hands-on experience with: Automation frameworks: Selenium, Python, Java API & backend testing Test design for distributed systems Experience testing AI/ML-based applications, including data validation and model accuracy testing. Solid understanding of cloud-native architectures, Docker, and Kubernetes. Experience integrating automation into CI/CD pipelines. Strong analytical, troubleshooting, and problem-solving skills. Experience working in Agile/Scrum Nice to Have Client facing experience in either sales or business development Exposure to data engineering pipelines and large-scale analytics systems. Experience with DevOps practices, infrastructure as code, and platform automation. Knowledge of observability stacks (InfluxDB, Prometheus, Grafana). Prior experience in SaaS or enterprise-scale platforms. Knowledge of manufacturing or shop-floor applications like MES (SiView, Fab300, etc) and equipment automation Knowledge of ERP integration strategies and EAI in general Ability to travel on company business, attend client functions, and professionally represent the company Certifications: Relevant certifications from public cloud solutions, ITIL, ISO 20000, COBIT. Agile Methodologies: Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments. Pay Range USD $80,000.00 - USD $125,000.00 /Yr.

job_description: Work Schedule Standard (Mon-Fri) Environmental Conditions Office Designs, develops, and executes software testing strategies to ensure product quality and reliability. Responsible for test planning, automation, execution, and defect management across the software development lifecycle. Works independently and may lead small project teams while collaborating with cross-functional and global stakeholders What will you do? Requirement Analysis & Collaboration Analyze system requirements and develop a deep understanding of applications under test Collaborate with cross-functional and geographically distributed teams Participate in QA activities throughout the software development lifecycle Test Planning & Documentation Design and develop test strategies, test plans, test cases, and test protocols Create and maintain SDLC documentation Define and assess defect severity and priority Test Environment & Tools Setup Configure/ Setup and maintain test environments, including hardware, software, and test data Set up and manage test and defect tracking tools (e.g., JIRA, JAMA) Test Automation & AI assistive testing Develop, maintain, and enhance automated test frameworks and scripts Utilize programming languages to improve test automation and efficiency Effectively use AI tools to accelerate test design and automation Test Execution Execute manual and automated test cases across development and release cycles Perform functional, system, regression, API, and performance testing Record and maintain test results in test management systems Defect Management Identify, document, and track defects with clear reproduction steps Perform root cause analysis and support issue resolution Monitor defect status and validate fixes through re-testing Leadership & Continuous Improvement Work independently and contribute to complex testing activities Lead small teams or testing efforts for assigned projects Drive continuous improvement in testing processes, tools, and methodologies How will you get here? Education Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Life Sciences, or related field with at least 5 years of relevant experience Candidates with less experience may be considered for junior roles Experience Experience in Software Quality Assurance (SQA) and testing methodologies Experience working in Agile environments and the full software testing lifecycle Proven experience in writing clear and comprehensive test plans and test cases Hands-on experience with both white-box and black-box testing Hands-on experience with test automation tools (e.g., Selenium, Appium) and programming/scripting (e.g., Java, Python, JavaScript, C#) Demonstrated ability to troubleshoot issues and perform root cause analysis Experience in completing end-to-end software testing projects Strong track record in software quality assurance and testing delivery Experience leading small teams or projects is preferred Exposure to hardware-software integration or embedded systems is an advantage Knowledge, Skills & Competencies (Preferred) Technical Expertise Test automation frameworks and tools (e.g., Selenium, Playwright) Programming languages (e.g., Java, Python, JavaScript, C#) API testing tools (e.g., Postman) Performance testing tools (e.g., JMeter, LoadRunner) Database testing and SQL Version control (Git) and CI/CD tools (e.g., Jenkins, Azure DevOps) Test management tools (e.g., JIRA, JAMA, HP ALM) Testing & QA Knowledge Strong understanding of QA methodologies, tools, and best practices Ability to create clear and comprehensive test documentation Experience in embedded systems testing is a plus Analytical & Problem-Solving Skills Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving capabilities Proficiency in root cause analysis and defect identification Detail-oriented with a proactive quality mindset Communication & Collaboration Strong verbal and written communication skills in English Ability to work effectively across teams and manage multiple priorities Domain Knowledge (Plus) Experience in life sciences or the biotechnology industry Familiarity with ISO and FDA regulatory standards

fit_summary: skills match 35/35; experience fit 6/15; profile pack 10/10

job_description: Description Job Summary The Senior Quality Assurance Engineerperforms and leads testing of multiple large, complex, and strategic software development applications using QA best practices and frameworks. This role provides appropriate and timely status, metrics, and communication to stakeholders. The Senior QA Engineer aids in the identification of continuous process improvement of QA standards, and practices. What you will do Perform the analysis of business requirements for accuracy, completeness, redundancy, ambiguity, and testability for multiple strategic software projects. Define the scope, approach, risks, and assumptions for testing. Design, build, and prioritize test cases. Execute manual and automated testing. Report and communicate test status and metrics to project stakeholders. Lead and/or participates in peer reviews of project deliverables. Work with stakeholders and development to define and develop testing requirements to validate software solutions were built to specifications. Plan, develop, execute, and maintain test cases, both manual and automated. Document and report defects within established process and tracking system. Create automated tests using JMeter for testing REST APIs and other test automation tools such as UFT or Tosca for UI tests. Integrate automated tests with CI/CD pipelines for continuous monitoring and alerting on failures. What we expect of you Bachelor’s Degree and 5 years of full life cycle Software Quality Assurance process experience (requirements analysis, decomposition, test case design, prioritization and risk analysis, test execution, metric reporting, etc.) OR 9 years of full life cycle Software Quality Assurance process experience. Track record of successfully leading multiple large-scale QA projects, including planning, estimating, and prioritizing. Excellent written and verbal communication skills with the ability to effectively communicate with project stakeholders and senior leadership. Experience with the full software development life cycle, testing methodologies, version control systems, and quality assurance. Demonstrable problem solving and analytical skills. Experience manually testing APIs, Desktop, and Web applications. Experience in designing and implantation of Software Quality Assurance standards and practices. Involvement in an Agile Environment, preferable utilizing SAFe Agile methodologies, a plus. Background utilizing JMeter or similar tools for automated API testing, a plus. Pay range: $103,000 – 151,400 depending on experience and skill set. Annual bonus target 5% subject to terms and conditions of plan. Benefits overview: https://cdw.benefit-info.com/ Salary ranges may be subject to geographic differentials. CDW is committed to being an AI-fluent organization We’re looking for people who bring curiosity, a learner’s mindset, and a willingness to engage with ever-evolving technology and tools. We value adopting AI as a partner, openness to experimentation, and a shared interest in learning together on AI. Our goal is to create a culture where AI enhances—not replaces—human creativity and decision-making. You don’t need to be an expert today; what matters is your readiness to explore, adapt, and grow with us as we integrate AI responsibly and effectively into our work. Additionally, CDW is committed to fostering an equitable, transparent, and respectful hiring process for all applicants. During our application process, our goal is to understand your experience, strengths, skills, and qualifications. As an AI forward company, we see AI not just as a tool, but as a catalyst for new ways of thinking, creating, and communicating. We encourage candidates to embrace an AI mindset, one that’s curious, adaptive, and ready to explore what’s possible. We welcome thoughtful use of AI to expand your perspective and elevate how you share your story, while ensuring your application remains rooted in your own background, judgment, and voice. About Us CDW is a Fortune 500 technology solutions provider that helps businesses, government, education, and healthcare organizations achieve what’s possible through technology. What makes CDW different isn’t just what we do—it’s how we do it. At CDW we act as one—building trust, speaking candidly, and working together to achieve more. We play to win—focusing on what matters most and delivering for our customers. And we think forward—staying curious, moving fast, and continuously learning. We believe meaningful work happens when people feel supported, heard, and empowered to contribute. That’s why we think of ourselves as coworkers, not just employees—working together to solve complex challenges and deliver real impact for our customers and communities. As a full‑stack, full‑lifecycle technology partner, CDW brings deep expertise, strong relationships, and broad industry knowledge to help turn ideas into outcomes. When you join CDW, you become part of a collaborative environment where your work matters, your growth is supported, and your contributions help shape what’s next. Together, we deliver the full promise of what technology can do. Together, we Make Amazing Happen. CDW is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regards to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability status, protected veteran status or any other basis prohibited by state and local law.

fit_summary: role alignment 25/25; location/work mode 2/15; experience fit 6/15; profile pack 8/10

job_description: About Us We’re the world’s leading provider of secure financial messaging services, headquartered in Belgium. We are the way the world moves value – across borders, through cities and overseas. No other organisation can address the scale, precision, pace and trust that this demands, and we’re proud to support the global economy. We’re unique too. We were established to find a better way for the global financial community to move value – a reliable, safe and secure approach that the community can trust, completely. We’re always striving to be better and are constantly evolving in an ever-changing landscape, without undermining that trust. Five decades on, our vibrant community reflects the complexity and diversity of the financial ecosystem. We innovate diligently, test exhaustively, then implement fast. In a connected and exciting era, our mission has never been more relevant. Swift now has a presence in 200+ countries and legal territories to serve a community of more than 12,000 banks and financial institutions. Job Summary Swift is seeking a highly skilled and experienced Senior Automation Engineer to design, develop, and maintain robust automation frameworks and scripts. This role is critical in ensuring the quality and efficiency of our software products through comprehensive test automation strategies. This is a HYBRID role that required two days a week onsite in Tysons, VA. Job Responsibilities Lead the design, development, and implementation of scalable and maintainable test automation frameworks using Robot Framework and Selenium. Develop, execute, and maintain automated test cases for complex applications, ensuring comprehensive test coverage. Collaborate with development and product teams to integrate automation into the CI/CD pipeline. Design and execute test plans, analyze test results, and provide detailed reports on application quality. Utilize Apigee API for testing and automating API functionalities. Manage and maintain test automation code repositories using Git. Perform data validation and manipulation using Structured Query Language (SQL) for various testing scenarios. Mentor junior automation engineers and contribute to best practices in test automation. Identify and implement new automation technologies and tools to improve efficiency and effectiveness. Participate in all phases of the software development lifecycle, from requirements gathering to deployment. Job Qualifications Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field. Minimum of 5-7 years of experience in test automation and software quality assurance. Proven expertise in designing and implementing automation frameworks using Robot Framework and Selenium. Strong proficiency in scripting languages relevant to test automation (e.g., Python). In-depth knowledge and experience with Apigee API for API testing and automation. Solid understanding and practical experience with Git for version control. Advanced skills in Structured Query Language (SQL) for database testing and data validation. Demonstrated experience in Test Case Design, Test Execution, and developing comprehensive Test Plans. Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills with a keen eye for detail. Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to work effectively in a team environment. Experience with other Automation Technology tools and concepts is a plus. The estimated salary range for a new hire into this position in Virginia is $101,303 MINIMUM to $188,135 MAXIMUM. Salary may vary depending on job-related factors which may include knowledge, skills, experience, and location. Our compensation packages include a competitive base salary and bonus opportunity for all employees contingent on personal and company performance. Our generous benefits program includes medical, dental, vision, and life insurance with no premium costs for our employees and their families, and retirement plan plus matching 401k. What We Offer We give you the freedom to be yourself. We are creating an environment of unique individuals – like you – with different perspectives on the financial industry and the world. A diverse and inclusive environment in which everyone’s voice counts and where you can reach your full potential. We are committed to an inclusive and accessible recruitment process. If you require a reasonable accommodation related to accessibility during your application or interview, please contact accessibility-Sysgroup@swift.com or indicate this in your application. Please note that this mailbox is not monitored for general recruitment enquiries and should only be used for accessibility or accommodation-related requests (for example related to vision, hearing or neurodiversity). All requests are confidential and will not affect your candidacy. Don’t meet every single requirement? At Swift, we are dedicated to building a workplace where people can bring their full selves and ideas to the team, so if you are excited about this role, we encourage you to apply even if you do not meet every single qualification.

Our compensation packages include a competitive base salary and bonus opportunity for all employees contingent on personal and company performance. Our generous benefits program includes medical, dental, vision, and life insurance with no premium costs for our employees and their families, and retirement plan plus matching 401k. What We Offer We give you the freedom to be yourself. We are creating an environment of unique individuals – like you – with different perspectives on the financial industry and the world. A diverse and inclusive environment in which everyone’s voice counts and where you can reach your full potential. We are committed to an inclusive and accessible recruitment process. If you require a reasonable accommodation related to accessibility during your application or interview, please contact accessibility-Sysgroup@swift.com or indicate this in your application. Please note that this mailbox is not monitored for general recruitment enquiries and should only be used for accessibility or accommodation-related requests (for example related to vision, hearing or neurodiversity). All requests are confidential and will not affect your candidacy. Don’t meet every single requirement? At Swift, we are dedicated to building a workplace where people can bring their full selves and ideas to the team, so if you are excited about this role, we encourage you to apply even if you do not meet every single qualification.

role_title: Senior Test Automation Engineer – Team Lead
job_description: Functieomschrijving Voor onze Software Solution CARE ADMIN zijn we op zoek naar een Senior Test Automation Engineer – Team Lead . Als Senior Test Automation Engineer – Team Lead vervoeg je een groeiend team dat instaat voor de kwaliteit, veiligheid en performantie van bij de klant opgeleverde IT‑oplossingen. Je combineert diepgaande technische expertise met een coördinerende en coachende rol binnen het test- en kwaliteitsdomein. Je speelt een sleutelrol in het uitbouwen, bewaken en continu verbeteren van de testautomatisatiestrategie binnen een moderne softwareontwikkelomgeving en fungeert als inhoudelijk en organisatorisch aanspreekpunt voor testing en quality assurance. Jouw Opdracht En Taken Vertalen van functionele en niet-functionele vereisten naar geautomatiseerde testscenario’s, met aandacht voor kwaliteit, risico’s en prioriteiten. Ontwerpen, ontwikkelen en onderhouden van test automation scripts en frameworks, met een duidelijke focus op Playwright. Kennis van TestComplete is een meerwaarde. Coördineren, uitvoeren en opvolgen van geautomatiseerde testcampagnes (regressie, integratie, end‑to‑end) en instaan voor heldere rapportering richting team en stakeholders. Opzetten, begeleiden en opvolgen van security testing (bv. basis kwetsbaarheidstesten, OWASP‑gericht denken) en performantietesten (load, stress, stabiliteit). Plannen en beheren van testomgevingen (hardware en software), in samenwerking met development, infrastructuur en andere betrokken teams. Detecteren, documenteren en prioriteren van anomalieën, escaleren naar het development team en opvolgen van correcties tot en met oplossing. Uitbouwen, documenteren en bewaken van teststrategie, testprocedures en best practices, en deze up‑to‑date houden. Coachen en inhoudelijk begeleiden van (junior en medior) test automation engineers en QA‑profielen, met aandacht voor kennisdeling en professionele groei. Documenteren van nieuwe functionaliteiten, testprocessen en testresultaten met oog op traceerbaarheid, kennisdeling en kwaliteitsborging. Actieve samenwerking binnen een Agile/Scrum‑context en deelname aan refinement, sprintplanning en retrospectives, met een adviserende rol op vlak van kwaliteit en testing. Vereisten Je beschikt over een bachelor binnen de informatica of over gelijkwaardige ervaring. Je hebt minstens 5 jaar relevante ervaring als test automation engineer in professionele softwareomgevingen. Je hebt aantoonbare ervaring in een senior, coördinerende of lead‑rol binnen testing en/of quality assurance. Je communiceert vlot in het Nederlands. Basiskennis van het Frans is een duidelijke plus. Je hebt sterke en aantoonbare ervaring met Playwright voor front‑end en end‑to‑end testautomatisatie. Je hebt ervaring met en/of een sterke affiniteit voor: Security testing (bv. OWASP‑principes, basis penetratiedenken) Performantietesten (bv. load- en stresstesten) Je bent vertrouwd met (of bereid je hierin verder te verdiepen): Tools voor issue- en projectbeheer zoals JIRA en/of Azure DevOps Testmanagementtools zoals Zephyr (JIRA plugin) of gelijkaardig Documentatie- en knowledge tools zoals Confluence Je hebt praktische ervaring met API‑testen (bv. Postman). Ervaring in een Agile omgeving is een pluspunt. Je werkt gestructureerd en methodisch, met oog voor kwaliteit en detail. Je beschikt over een sterke analytische en probleemoplossende mindset. Je neemt ownership over kwaliteit, processen en resultaten. Je werkt graag in teamverband en beschikt over sterke communicatieve, coachende en interpersoonlijke vaardigheden.

job_description: Job Description: Conducts routine and non-routine analysis of raw materials, in-process items and finished product according to established operating procedures. Compiles data for documentation of test procedures that may include stability program testing and formulation studies. Calibrates and maintains lab and analytical equipment. Participates in the preparation of investigations, summaries and reports. Reviews data obtained for compliance to specifications and reports abnormalities. Revises and updates standard operating procedures as needed. May perform special projects on analytical and instrument problem solving. May develop testing and analysis methods and procedures in accordance with established guidelines. Learns to use professional concepts, applications of basic principles, and theories. Solves routine problems of limited scope and complexity following established policies and procedures. Normally receives detailed instructions on most work. Typically requires a degree and little to no previous professional experience.

role_title: Senior SDET - ODP | Open Source Data Platform
job_description: As a Senior SDET @ ODP You will be the gatekeeper for product and platform quality and come up with a Project/Feature system test strategy, test plans, resource planning, and execution strategy. Develop maintainable test automation tools and automated test suites. You will also work closely with Software Engineers and solution engineers from the beginning of the development/test cycle and be an integral part of the engineering team. Along with automation, create expertise in data technologies, platform components, and features maintain test coverage, regression pipelines, and release management. A day in the life of a Senior SDET Develop, design, and maintain test automation frameworks and tools using programming languages such as Java Collaborate with development teams to develop test strategies and plans for new product features. Design, execute, and maintain automated test suites to ensure the quality of our products. Perform manual testing when necessary, and identify and report defects. Work with build management tools like Git, Jenkins, and other CI/CD tools to ensure smooth build and deployment processes. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to troubleshoot and resolve issues, and improve product quality. Monitor and analyse test results, and provide feedback to development teams to improve the efficiency and effectiveness of testing processes. You are a great fit, if you have 4-8 years of working experience in Test Automation with expertise in Open Source Project and API Automation. Strong programming skills in Java and other scripting languages. Experience in database testing to validate data integrity, ensuring high availability and responsiveness of our data systems. Good understanding of Hadoop ecosystems. Hands-on experience with building processes, CI processes, and managing QA environments. Experience working with build management tools like Git and Jenkins. Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills. Strong communication and collaboration skills. Ability to work independently as well as in a team environment. Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or a related field. Bonus Points Proficiency in Big Data Testing / Hadoop Testing. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

job_description: Job Title Senior Test Automation Engineer Job Description We are seeking a highly skilled Senior Test Automation Engineer with strong experience in end‑to‑end testing, automation, and integration of complex software systems. The ideal candidate brings deep technical expertise, strong communication skills, and the ability to collaborate across global, cross‑functional teams to ensure high‑quality product delivery. Key Responsibilities Test Automation & Framework Development Design, develop, and maintain UI and API automation using Java or C# frameworks. Create and enhance BDD tests using Gherkin and frameworks like Cucumber. Write clean, reusable, maintainable automation code with best practices for naming, structure, and test data management. Continuously improve automation frameworks and pipelines to increase stability and coverage. Develop and maintain automated tests validating integration points across systems/modules. Testing & Quality Assurance Own the end-to-end testing lifecycle including test planning, test case creation, execution, and reporting. Perform functional and non-functional testing, including system integration, performance, and regression tests. Proactively identify, analyse, and investigate defects; collaborate with developers, architects, and QA to resolve issues. Ensure high-quality delivery by driving defect root-cause analysis and quality improvements. Engineering Collaboration & Agile Delivery Represent the testing mindset within the development team; act as the test conscience and quality advocate. Collaborate closely with Product Owners, Architects, Developers, and Scrum Masters to understand requirements and deliverables. Work effectively in Agile/Scrum or SAFe environments with multiple stakeholders and evolving priorities. Participate in ongoing integration and system validation initiatives. Tools, Technologies & CI/CD Strong hands-on experience with: API Testing: Postman, SoapUI UI Automation: Playwright or Cypress BDD: Cucumber, Gherkin CI/CD: Jenkins, Bamboo, Flux or similar Version Control: Git (Bitbucket) Test Management: Jira, Quality Center (QC) Experience with cloud ecosystems (Azure/AWS) and containerized environments (Docker). Advantage: knowledge of Kafka, Gatling, or distributed systems. Required Skills & Competencies 8+ years of experience in test automation and system integration. Strong understanding of software testing principles, test design techniques, and automation strategy. Ability to independently evaluate requirements, design test cases, and deliver high-quality automation scripts. Excellent communication skills—verbal, written, and the ability to influence stakeholders. Strong analytical, problem-solving, and debugging skills. Proactive, self-driven, and capable of working with minimal supervision. Ability to mentor juniors and support onboarding of new team members. Willingness to travel internationally for project needs. Preferred Qualifications BE/MCA (or higher) with proven experience in similar roles. ISTQB certification (advantage). Domain knowledge in logistics or warehousing (advantage).
